Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0810 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Dragon's Kingdom.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0480 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Dragon's Kingdom.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $0400 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game. Also restored 32 bytes of data to the loading screen bitmap at $FD30 which were corrupted at the end of the original loading code by a call to the kernal RESTOR routine ($FD15).
Note: the game should be dumped on the 2nd hit at $0810.
